title: VA Health Care
summary: Eligible veterans may enroll in VA health care services, including primary care, specialty care, and prescriptions.
eligibilityNotes: Eligibility depends on service history, discharge status, and other factors. Disability rating may affect priority group and copays.

title: VA Disability Compensation
summary: Monthly tax-free payments for veterans with service-connected disabilities.
eligibilityNotes: Disability must be connected to military service and rated by the VA.

title: VA Home Loan Guaranty
summary: VA-backed home loans with no down payment and competitive interest rates.
eligibilityNotes: Available to eligible veterans, service members, and some surviving spouses. Disability rating may waive the VA funding fee.

title: GI Bill Education Benefits
summary: Education benefits to help veterans, service members, and dependents pay for school or training.
eligibilityNotes: Eligibility depends on service history and discharge status. Multiple GI Bill programs exist.

title: VA Life Insurance
summary: Life insurance programs for veterans, including coverage for those with service-connected disabilities.
eligibilityNotes: Programs vary based on service status, disability, and application timing.

title: VA Burial and Memorial Benefits
summary: Burial benefits for eligible veterans, including national cemetery burial, headstones, and burial allowances.
eligibilityNotes: Eligibility depends on service history and discharge status.
